mainEntity.name: When is transfer pricing documentation required?

acceptedAnswer.text: Transfer pricing documentation is mandatory for entities with international transactions exceeding Rs 1 crore or specified domestic transactions exceeding Rs 20 crores in aggregate. The documentation must be maintained by the due date of filing the return of income.

mainEntity.name: What is the penalty for not maintaining transfer pricing documentation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Failure to maintain TP documentation attracts penalty of 2% of the value of international transactions under Section 271AA. Additional penalties apply for non-filing of CbCR (Rs 5,000/day) and failure to furnish information (Rs 50,000/day).

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to prepare a transfer pricing study?

acceptedAnswer.text: Typically 2-4 weeks depending on the number and complexity of international transactions. We recommend starting well before the return filing due date. Contact us at +91-99622 60333 for timeline confirmation.
